title: Invocation::new doc is trivial restatement
description: jmap.rs line 193: '/// Create a new Invocation.' restates exactly what every Rust ::new function does and adds no information. It does not mention the call_id uniqueness requirement (RFC 8620 §3.2) or that method must be a valid JMAP method name string. Either expand to state the constraints or remove the comment entirely to avoid noise.
